subject: Improving deploy plugin for quick deployments
commit_message:
Improving deploy plugin for quick deployments

Change-Id: I21e162c292f316b320ce93536f030de8ba1a90b1
Issue-ID: OOM-1728
Signed-off-by: mahendrr <mahendra.raghuwanshi@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2072/

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2072/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/2072

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

integration specifically needs this to be sequential and delayed between subcharts, since running too many deploys together too quickly causes disk contention issues in the open lab.  If a parallel option is desired, it needs to be made an explicit option that can be disabled.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Gating OK
comparison on deployment duration estimation (need to be consolidated on more gating to be confirmed): 25-30% gain

Patch Set 2:

> > If a parallel option is desired, it needs to be made an explicit
 > option that can be disabled.
 > 
 > Good point

This was an attempt to find the right direction, I can provide the option to enable it if we really want to move ahead with this approach.
@Mike: What is your opinion here? If we can take this as an interim solution with a flag to ena ble/disable and then in El-Alto we can have a solution to rollback if any component failed to upgrade. Better to have a clear story around it.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This change is ready for review.

Abandoned

Abandon
